metadata.name: Gitea
metadata.description: Lightweight, self-hosted Git service with a web interface for repository hosting, code review, issue tracking, and team collaboration. Written in Go.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Lightweight, self-hosted Git service with a web interface for repository hosting, code review, issue tracking, and team collaboration. Written in Go.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` and `.env` as files.

1. Decide on service names, ports, volumes, credentials, and optional integrations before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in the required variables first, then enable optional sections such as Traefik, metrics, or extra services only when needed.
3. Render the Compose project, review the generated files, and start it with Docker Compose in the target directory.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Name of the service; optional; default: gitea.
- `container_timezone`: Timezone used inside the container; optional.
- `user_uid`: Value used for the general settings; optional; default: 1000.
- `user_gid`: Value used for the general settings; optional; default: 1000.
- `restart_policy`: Policy used for Restart; required; default: unless-stopped; options: unless-stopped, always, on-failure, no.
- `gitea_url`: URL used for Public; optional; default: https://git.home.arpa; shown when: traefik_enabled=false.

### Database
- `database_type`: Type used for Database Backend; optional; default: sqlite; options: sqlite, postgres, mysql.
- `database_name`: Name of the database; optional; default: gitea; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql.
- `database_user`: Username for the database; optional; default: gitea; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql.
- `database_host`: Hostname of the database server; optional; default: postgres; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql;database_external=true.
- `database_password`: Password for the database; optional; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql.
- `database_external`: Use external database; optional; default: false; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql.

### Ports
- `ports_http`: Host port exposed for HTTP; optional; default: 3000.
- `ports_ssh`: Value used for the ports settings; optional; default: 2221.

### Traefik
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_host`: Hostname used for Traefik; optional.
- `traefik_domain`: Domain used for Traefik; required.
- `traefik_network`: Network used for Traefik; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable Traefik TLS; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik Tls Certresolver; required; default: cloudflare; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.

## References
- [Gitea](https://about.gitea.com/)
- [Documentation](https://docs.gitea.com/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea)
## Notes
- Supports SQLite (default), PostgreSQL, and MySQL as database backends. SQLite is suitable for small deployments; PostgreSQL or MySQL is recommended for larger installations.
